ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Team lead for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "current_cost" REAL /* Current cost incurred by the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "instance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance type being monitored */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "ram_usage" REAL /* RAM usage percentage */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metric */,
  "disk_read_iops" INTEGER /* Disk read IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second) */,
  "disk_write_iops" INTEGER /* Disk write IOPS */,
  "network_in" INTEGER /* Network inbound traffic in bytes */,
  "network_out" INTEGER /* Network outbound traffic in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission applies to */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource name (e.g., instance types, projects) */,
  "can_create" INTEGER /* Permission to create the resource */,
  "can_read" INTEGER /* Permission to read the resource */,
  "can_update" INTEGER /* Permission to update the resource */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud service provider */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud service provider (e.g., AWS, Azure) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the cloud service */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the cloud service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cloud service (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service these credentials belong to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credentials were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credentials were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_credentials_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Name of the resource being accessed or modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "instance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance type associated with the alert */,
  "cpu_threshold" REAL /* CPU usage threshold for alerts */,
  "ram_threshold" REAL /* RAM usage threshold for alerts */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email to notify when thresholds are breached */,
  "disk_threshold" REAL /* Disk usage threshold for alerts */,
  "network_in_threshold" REAL /* Network inbound traffic threshold for alerts */,
  "network_out_threshold" REAL /* Network outbound traffic threshold for alerts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "instance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance type related to the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
